--------------------------------------------------

Component: Masonry

--------------------------------------------------

Component: Glass Surface

Installation:
npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/GlassSurface-JS-CSS

Usage:
1import GlassSurface from './GlassSurface'
2
3// Basic usage
4<GlassSurface 
5  width={300} 
6  height={200}
7  borderRadius={50}
8  className="my-custom-class"
9>
10  <h2>Glass Surface Content</h2>
11</GlassSurface>
12
13// Custom displacement effects
14<GlassSurface
15  displace={0.5}
16  distortionScale={-180}
17  redOffset={0}
18  greenOffset={10}
19  blueOffset={20}
20  brightness={50}
21  opacity={0.93}
22  mixBlendMode="screen"
23>
24  <span>Advanced Glass Distortion</span>
25</GlassSurface>

Code:
1/* eslint-disable react-hooks/exhaustive-deps */
2import { useEffect, useState, useRef, useId } from 'react';
3import './GlassSurface.css';
4
5const GlassSurface = ({
6  children,
7  width = 200,
8  height = 80,
9  borderRadius = 20,
10  borderWidth = 0.07,
11  brightness = 50,
12  opacity = 0.93,
13  blur = 11,
14  displace = 0,
15  backgroundOpacity = 0,
16  saturation = 1,
17  distortionScale = -180,
18  redOffset = 0,
19  greenOffset = 10,
20  blueOffset = 20,
21  xChannel = 'R',
22  yChannel = 'G',
23  mixBlendMode = 'difference',
24  className = '',
25  style = {}
26}) => {
27  const uniqueId = useId().replace(/:/g, '-');
28  const filterId = `glass-filter-${uniqueId}`;
29  const redGradId = `red-grad-${uniqueId}`;
30  const blueGradId = `blue-grad-${uniqueId}`;
31
32  const [svgSupported, setSvgSupported] = useState(false);
33
34  const containerRef = useRef(null);
35  const feImageRef = useRef(null);
36  const redChannelRef = useRef(null);
37  const greenChannelRef = useRef(null);
38  const blueChannelRef = useRef(null);
39  const gaussianBlurRef = useRef(null);
40
41  const generateDisplacementMap = () => {
42    const rect = containerRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();
43    const actualWidth = rect?.width || 400;
44    const actualHeight = rect?.height || 200;
45    const edgeSize = Math.min(actualWidth, actualHeight) * (borderWidth * 0.5);
46
47    const svgContent = `
48      <svg viewBox="0 0 ${actualWidth} ${actualHeight}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
49        <defs>
50          <linearGradient id="${redGradId}" x1="100%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="0%">
51            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0000"/>
52            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="red"/>
53          </linearGradient>
54          <linearGradient id="${blueGradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
55            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0000"/>
56            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="blue"/>
57          </linearGradient>
58        </defs>
59        <rect x="0" y="0" width="${actualWidth}" height="${actualHeight}" fill="black"></rect>
60        <rect x="0" y="0" width="${actualWidth}" height="${actualHeight}" rx="${borderRadius}" fill="url(#${redGradId})" />
61        <rect x="0" y="0" width="${actualWidth}" height="${actualHeight}" rx="${borderRadius}" fill="url(#${blueGradId})" style="mix-blend-mode: ${mixBlendMode}" />
62        <rect x="${edgeSize}" y="${edgeSize}" width="${actualWidth - edgeSize * 2}" height="${actualHeight - edgeSize * 2}" rx="${borderRadius}" fill="hsl(0 0% ${brightness}% / ${opacity})" style="filter:blur(${blur}px)" />
63      </svg>
64    `;
65
66    return `data:image/svg+xml,${encodeURIComponent(svgContent)}`;
67  };
68
69  const updateDisplacementMap = () => {
70    feImageRef.current?.setAttribute('href', generateDisplacementMap());
71  };
72
73  useEffect(() => {
74    updateDisplacementMap();
75    [
76      { ref: redChannelRef, offset: redOffset },
77      { ref: greenChannelRef, offset: greenOffset },
78      { ref: blueChannelRef, offset: blueOffset }
79    ].forEach(({ ref, offset }) => {
80      if (ref.current) {
81        ref.current.setAttribute('scale', (distortionScale + offset).toString());
82        ref.current.setAttribute('xChannelSelector', xChannel);
83        ref.current.setAttribute('yChannelSelector', yChannel);
84      }
85    });
86
87    gaussianBlurRef.current?.setAttribute('stdDeviation', displace.toString());
88  }, [
89    width,
90    height,
91    borderRadius,
92    borderWidth,
93    brightness,
94    opacity,
95    blur,
96    displace,
97    distortionScale,
98    redOffset,
99    greenOffset,
100    blueOffset,
101    xChannel,
102    yChannel,
103    mixBlendMode
104  ]);
105
106  useEffect(() => {
107    if (!containerRef.current) return;
108
109    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
110      setTimeout(updateDisplacementMap, 0);
111    });
112
113    resizeObserver.observe(containerRef.current);
114
115    return () => {
116      resizeObserver.disconnect();
117    };
118  }, []);
119
120  useEffect(() => {
121    if (!containerRef.current) return;
122
123    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
124      setTimeout(updateDisplacementMap, 0);
125    });
126
127    resizeObserver.observe(containerRef.current);
128
129    return () => {
130      resizeObserver.disconnect();
131    };
132  }, []);
133
134  useEffect(() => {
135    setTimeout(updateDisplacementMap, 0);
136  }, [width, height]);
137
138  useEffect(() => {
139    setSvgSupported(supportsSVGFilters());
140  }, []);
141
142  const supportsSVGFilters = () => {
143    if (typeof window === 'undefined' || typeof document === 'undefined') {
144      return false;
145    }
146
147    const isWebkit = /Safari/.test(navigator.userAgent) && !/Chrome/.test(navigator.userAgent);
148    const isFirefox = /Firefox/.test(navigator.userAgent);
149
150    if (isWebkit || isFirefox) {
151      return false;
152    }
153
154    const div = document.createElement('div');
155    div.style.backdropFilter = `url(#${filterId})`;
156
157    return div.style.backdropFilter !== '';
158  };
159
160  const containerStyle = {
161    ...style,
162    width: typeof width === 'number' ? `${width}px` : width,
163    height: typeof height === 'number' ? `${height}px` : height,
164    borderRadius: `${borderRadius}px`,
165    '--glass-frost': backgroundOpacity,
166    '--glass-saturation': saturation,
167    '--filter-id': `url(#${filterId})`
168  };
169
170  return (
171    <div
172      ref={containerRef}
173      className={`glass-surface ${svgSupported ? 'glass-surface--svg' : 'glass-surface--fallback'} ${className}`}
174      style={containerStyle}
175    >
176      <svg className="glass-surface__filter" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
177        <defs>
178          <filter id={filterId} colorInterpolationFilters="sRGB" x="0%" y="0%" width="100%" height="100%">
179            <feImage ref={feImageRef} x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" preserveAspectRatio="none" result="map" />
180
181            <feDisplacementMap ref={redChannelRef} in="SourceGraphic" in2="map" id="redchannel" result="dispRed" />
182            <feColorMatrix
183              in="dispRed"
184              type="matrix"
185              values="1 0 0 0 0
186                      0 0 0 0 0
187                      0 0 0 0 0
188                      0 0 0 1 0"
189              result="red"
190            />
191
192            <feDisplacementMap
193              ref={greenChannelRef}
194              in="SourceGraphic"
195              in2="map"
196              id="greenchannel"
197              result="dispGreen"
198            />
199            <feColorMatrix
200              in="dispGreen"
201              type="matrix"
202              values="0 0 0 0 0
203                      0 1 0 0 0
204                      0 0 0 0 0
205                      0 0 0 1 0"
206              result="green"
207            />
208
209            <feDisplacementMap ref={blueChannelRef} in="SourceGraphic" in2="map" id="bluechannel" result="dispBlue" />
210            <feColorMatrix
211              in="dispBlue"
212              type="matrix"
213              values="0 0 0 0 0
214                      0 0 0 0 0
215                      0 0 1 0 0
216                      0 0 0 1 0"
217              result="blue"
218            />
219
220            <feBlend in="red" in2="green" mode="screen" result="rg" />
221            <feBlend in="rg" in2="blue" mode="screen" result="output" />
222            <feGaussianBlur ref={gaussianBlurRef} in="output" stdDeviation="0.7" />
223          </filter>
224        </defs>
225      </svg>
226
227      <div className="glass-surface__content">{children}</div>
228    </div>
229  );
230};
231
232export default GlassSurface;
233

Extra Config/Code:
1.glass-surface {
2  position: relative;
3  display: flex;
4  align-items: center;
5  justify-content: center;
6  overflow: hidden;
7  transition: opacity 0.26s ease-out;
8}
9
10.glass-surface__filter {
11  width: 100%;
12  height: 100%;
13  pointer-events: none;
14  position: absolute;
15  inset: 0;
16  opacity: 0;
17  z-index: -1;
18}
19
20.glass-surface__content {
21  width: 100%;
22  height: 100%;
23  display: flex;
24  align-items: center;
25  justify-content: center;
26  padding: 0.5rem;
27  border-radius: inherit;
28  position: relative;
29  z-index: 1;
30}
31
32.glass-surface--svg {
33  background: light-dark(hsl(0 0% 100% / var(--glass-frost, 0)), hsl(0 0% 0% / var(--glass-frost, 0)));
34  backdrop-filter: var(--filter-id, url(#glass-filter)) saturate(var(--glass-saturation, 1));
35  box-shadow:
36    0 0 2px 1px light-dark(color-mix(in oklch, black, transparent 85%), color-mix(in oklch, white, transparent 65%))
37      inset,
38    0 0 10px 4px light-dark(color-mix(in oklch, black, transparent 90%), color-mix(in oklch, white, transparent 85%))
39      inset,
40    0px 4px 16px rgba(17, 17, 26, 0.05),
41    0px 8px 24px rgba(17, 17, 26, 0.05),
42    0px 16px 56px rgba(17, 17, 26, 0.05),
43    0px 4px 16px rgba(17, 17, 26, 0.05) inset,
44    0px 8px 24px rgba(17, 17, 26, 0.05) inset,
45    0px 16px 56px rgba(17, 17, 26, 0.05) inset;
46}
47
48.glass-surface--fallback {
49  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
50  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.8) brightness(1.1);
51  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.8) brightness(1.1);
52  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
53  box-shadow:
54    0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.2),
55    0 2px 16px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.1),
56    inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4),
57    inset 0 -1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
58}
59
60@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
61  .glass-surface--fallback {
62    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
63    backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.8) brightness(1.2);
64    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(1.8) brightness(1.2);
65    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
66    box-shadow:
67      inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2),
68      inset 0 -1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
69  }
70}
71
72@supports not (backdrop-filter: blur(10px)) {
73  .glass-surface--fallback {
74    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
75    box-shadow:
76      inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5),
77      inset 0 -1px 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
78  }
79
80  .glass-surface--fallback::before {
81    content: '';
82    position: absolute;
83    inset: 0;
84    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
85    border-radius: inherit;
86    z-index: -1;
87  }
88}
89
90@supports not (backdrop-filter: blur(10px)) {
91  @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
92    .glass-surface--fallback {
93      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
94    }
95
96    .glass-surface--fallback::before {
97      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
98    }
99  }
100}
101
102.glass-surface:focus-visible {
103  outline: 2px solid light-dark(#007aff, #0a84ff);
104  outline-offset: 2px;
105}
106

--------------------------------------------------

Component: Dome Gallery

Installation:
npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/DomeGallery-JS-CSS

Usage:
1import DomeGallery from './DomeGallery';
2export default function App() {
3  return (
4    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh' }}>
5      <DomeGallery
6  fit={0.8}
7  minRadius={600}
8  maxVerticalRotationDeg={0}
9  segments={34}
10  dragDampening={2}
11  grayscale
12/>
13    </div>
14  );
15}

Code:
1import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
2import { useGesture } from '@use-gesture/react';
3import './DomeGallery.css';
4
5const DEFAULT_IMAGES = [
6  {
7    src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1755331039789-7e5680e26e8f?q=80&w=774&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D',
8    alt: 'Abstract art'
9  },
10  {
11    src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1755569309049-98410b94f66d?q=80&w=772&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D',
12    alt: 'Modern sculpture'
13  },
14  {
15    src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1755497595318-7e5e3523854f?q=80&w=774&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D',
16    alt: 'Digital artwork'
17  },

20    alt: 'Contemporary art'

23    src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1745965976680-d00be7dc0377?q=80&w=774&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D',
24    alt: 'Geometric pattern'

26  {
27    src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1752588975228-21f44630bb3c?q=80&w=774&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D',
28    alt: 'Textured surface'
29  },
30  { src: 'https://pbs.twimg.com/media/Gyla7NnXMAAXSo_?format=jpg&name=large', alt: 'Social media image' }
31];
32
33const DEFAULTS = {
34  maxVerticalRotationDeg: 5,
35  dragSensitivity: 20,
36  enlargeTransitionMs: 300,
37  segments: 35
38};
39
40const clamp = (v, min, max) => Math.min(Math.max(v, min), max);
41const normalizeAngle = d => ((d % 360) + 360) % 360;
42const wrapAngleSigned = deg => {
43  const a = (((deg + 180) % 360) + 360) % 360;
44  return a - 180;
45};
46const getDataNumber = (el, name, fallback) => {
47  const attr = el.dataset[name] ?? el.getAttribute(`data-${name}`);
48  const n = attr == null ? NaN : parseFloat(attr);
49  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
50};
51
52function buildItems(pool, seg) {
53  const xCols = Array.from({ length: seg }, (_, i) => -37 + i * 2);
54  const evenYs = [-4, -2, 0, 2, 4];
55  const oddYs = [-3, -1, 1, 3, 5];
56
57  const coords = xCols.flatMap((x, c) => {
58    const ys = c % 2 === 0 ? evenYs : oddYs;
59    return ys.map(y => ({ x, y, sizeX: 2, sizeY: 2 }));
60  });
61
62  const totalSlots = coords.length;
63  if (pool.length === 0) {
64    return coords.map(c => ({ ...c, src: '', alt: '' }));
65  }
66  if (pool.length > totalSlots) {
67    console.warn(
68      `[DomeGallery] Provided image count (${pool.length}) exceeds available tiles (${totalSlots}). Some images will not be shown.`
69    );
70  }
71
72  const normalizedImages = pool.map(image => {
73    if (typeof image === 'string') {
74      return { src: image, alt: '' };
75    }
76    return { src: image.src || '', alt: image.alt || '' };
77  });
78
79  const usedImages = Array.from({ length: totalSlots }, (_, i) => normalizedImages[i % normalizedImages.length]);
80
81  for (let i = 1; i < usedImages.length; i++) {
82    if (usedImages[i].src === usedImages[i - 1].src) {
83      for (let j = i + 1; j < usedImages.length; j++) {
84        if (usedImages[j].src !== usedImages[i].src) {
85          const tmp = usedImages[i];
86          usedImages[i] = usedImages[j];
87          usedImages[j] = tmp;
88          break;
89        }
90      }
91    }
92  }
93
94  return coords.map((c, i) => ({
95    ...c,
96    src: usedImages[i].src,
97    alt: usedImages[i].alt
98  }));
99}
100
101function computeItemBaseRotation(offsetX, offsetY, sizeX, sizeY, segments) {
102  const unit = 360 / segments / 2;
103  const rotateY = unit * (offsetX + (sizeX - 1) / 2);
104  const rotateX = unit * (offsetY - (sizeY - 1) / 2);
105  return { rotateX, rotateY };
106}
107
108export default function DomeGallery({
109  images = DEFAULT_IMAGES,
110  fit = 0.5,
111  fitBasis = 'auto',
112  minRadius = 600,
113  maxRadius = Infinity,
114  padFactor = 0.25,
115  overlayBlurColor = '#060010',
116  maxVerticalRotationDeg = DEFAULTS.maxVerticalRotationDeg,
117  dragSensitivity = DEFAULTS.dragSensitivity,
118  enlargeTransitionMs = DEFAULTS.enlargeTransitionMs,
119  segments = DEFAULTS.segments,
120  dragDampening = 2,
121  openedImageWidth = '250px',
122  openedImageHeight = '350px',
123  imageBorderRadius = '30px',
124  openedImageBorderRadius = '30px',
125  grayscale = true
126}) {
127  const rootRef = useRef(null);
128  const mainRef = useRef(null);
129  const sphereRef = useRef(null);
130  const frameRef = useRef(null);
131  const viewerRef = useRef(null);
132  const scrimRef = useRef(null);
133  const focusedElRef = useRef(null);
134  const originalTilePositionRef = useRef(null);
135
136  const rotationRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });
137  const startRotRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });
138  const startPosRef = useRef(null);
139  const draggingRef = useRef(false);
140  const movedRef = useRef(false);
141  const inertiaRAF = useRef(null);
142  const openingRef = useRef(false);
143  const openStartedAtRef = useRef(0);
144  const lastDragEndAt = useRef(0);
145
146  const scrollLockedRef = useRef(false);
147  const lockScroll = useCallback(() => {
148    if (scrollLockedRef.current) return;
149    scrollLockedRef.current = true;
150    document.body.classList.add('dg-scroll-lock');
151  }, []);
152  const unlockScroll = useCallback(() => {
153    if (!scrollLockedRef.current) return;
154    if (rootRef.current?.getAttribute('data-enlarging') === 'true') return;
155    scrollLockedRef.current = false;
156    document.body.classList.remove('dg-scroll-lock');
157  }, []);
158
159  const items = useMemo(() => buildItems(images, segments), [images, segments]);
160
161  const applyTransform = (xDeg, yDeg) => {
162    const el = sphereRef.current;
163    if (el) {
164      el.style.transform = `translateZ(calc(var(--radius) * -1)) rotateX(${xDeg}deg) rotateY(${yDeg}deg)`;
165    }
166  };
167
168  const lockedRadiusRef = useRef(null);
169
170  useEffect(() => {
171    const root = rootRef.current;
172    if (!root) return;
173    const ro = new ResizeObserver(entries => {
174      const cr = entries[0].contentRect;
175      const w = Math.max(1, cr.width),
176        h = Math.max(1, cr.height);
177      const minDim = Math.min(w, h),
178        maxDim = Math.max(w, h),
179        aspect = w / h;
180      let basis;
181      switch (fitBasis) {
182        case 'min':
183          basis = minDim;
184          break;
185        case 'max':
186          basis = maxDim;
187          break;
188        case 'width':
189          basis = w;
190          break;
191        case 'height':
192          basis = h;
193          break;
194        default:
195          basis = aspect >= 1.3 ? w : minDim;
196      }
197      let radius = basis * fit;
198      const heightGuard = h * 1.35;
199      radius = Math.min(radius, heightGuard);
200      radius = clamp(radius, minRadius, maxRadius);
201      lockedRadiusRef.current = Math.round(radius);
202
203      const viewerPad = Math.max(8, Math.round(minDim * padFactor));
204      root.style.setProperty('--radius', `${lockedRadiusRef.current}px`);
205      root.style.setProperty('--viewer-pad', `${viewerPad}px`);
206      root.style.setProperty('--overlay-blur-color', overlayBlurColor);
207      root.style.setProperty('--tile-radius', imageBorderRadius);
208      root.style.setProperty('--enlarge-radius', openedImageBorderRadius);
209      root.style.setProperty('--image-filter', grayscale ? 'grayscale(1)' : 'none');
210      applyTransform(rotationRef.current.x, rotationRef.current.y);
211
212      const enlargedOverlay = viewerRef.current?.querySelector('.enlarge');
213      if (enlargedOverlay && frameRef.current && mainRef.current) {
214        const frameR = frameRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
215        const mainR = mainRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
216
217        const hasCustomSize = openedImageWidth && openedImageHeight;
218        if (hasCustomSize) {
219          const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
220          tempDiv.style.cssText = `position: absolute; width: ${openedImageWidth}; height: ${openedImageHeight}; visibility: hidden;`;
221          document.body.appendChild(tempDiv);
222          const tempRect = tempDiv.getBoundingClientRect();
223          document.body.removeChild(tempDiv);
224
225          const centeredLeft = frameR.left - mainR.left + (frameR.width - tempRect.width) / 2;
226          const centeredTop = frameR.top - mainR.top + (frameR.height - tempRect.height) / 2;
227
228          enlargedOverlay.style.left = `${centeredLeft}px`;
229          enlargedOverlay.style.top = `${centeredTop}px`;
230        } else {
231          enlargedOverlay.style.left = `${frameR.left - mainR.left}px`;
232          enlargedOverlay.style.top = `${frameR.top - mainR.top}px`;
233          enlargedOverlay.style.width = `${frameR.width}px`;
234          enlargedOverlay.style.height = `${frameR.height}px`;
235        }
236      }
237    });
238    ro.observe(root);
239    return () => ro.disconnect();
240  }, [
241    fit,
242    fitBasis,
243    minRadius,
244    maxRadius,
245    padFactor,
246    overlayBlurColor,
247    grayscale,
248    imageBorderRadius,
249    openedImageBorderRadius,
250    openedImageWidth,
251    openedImageHeight
252  ]);
253
254  useEffect(() => {
255    applyTransform(rotationRef.current.x, rotationRef.current.y);
256  }, []);
257
258  const stopInertia = useCallback(() => {
259    if (inertiaRAF.current) {
260      cancelAnimationFrame(inertiaRAF.current);
261      inertiaRAF.current = null;
262    }
263  }, []);
264
265  const startInertia = useCallback(
266    (vx, vy) => {
267      const MAX_V = 1.4;
268      let vX = clamp(vx, -MAX_V, MAX_V) * 80;
269      let vY = clamp(vy, -MAX_V, MAX_V) * 80;
270      let frames = 0;
271      const d = clamp(dragDampening ?? 0.6, 0, 1);
272      const frictionMul = 0.94 + 0.055 * d;
273      const stopThreshold = 0.015 - 0.01 * d;
274      const maxFrames = Math.round(90 + 270 * d);
275      const step = () => {
276        vX *= frictionMul;
277        vY *= frictionMul;
278        if (Math.abs(vX) < stopThreshold && Math.abs(vY) < stopThreshold) {
279          inertiaRAF.current = null;
280          return;
281        }
282        if (++frames > maxFrames) {
283          inertiaRAF.current = null;
284          return;
285        }
286        const nextX = clamp(rotationRef.current.x - vY / 200, -maxVerticalRotationDeg, maxVerticalRotationDeg);
287        const nextY = wrapAngleSigned(rotationRef.current.y + vX / 200);
288        rotationRef.current = { x: nextX, y: nextY };
289        applyTransform(nextX, nextY);
290        inertiaRAF.current = requestAnimationFrame(step);
291      };
292      stopInertia();
293      inertiaRAF.current = requestAnimationFrame(step);
294    },
295    [dragDampening, maxVerticalRotationDeg, stopInertia]
296  );
297
298  useGesture(
299    {
300      onDragStart: ({ event }) => {
301        if (focusedElRef.current) return;
302        stopInertia();
303        const evt = event;
304        draggingRef.current = true;
305        movedRef.current = false;
306        startRotRef.current = { ...rotationRef.current };
307        startPosRef.current = { x: evt.clientX, y: evt.clientY };
308      },
309      onDrag: ({ event, last, velocity = [0, 0], direction = [0, 0], movement }) => {
310        if (focusedElRef.current || !draggingRef.current || !startPosRef.current) return;
311        const evt = event;
312        const dxTotal = evt.clientX - startPosRef.current.x;
313        const dyTotal = evt.clientY - startPosRef.current.y;
314        if (!movedRef.current) {
315          const dist2 = dxTotal * dxTotal + dyTotal * dyTotal;
316          if (dist2 > 16) movedRef.current = true;
317        }
318        const nextX = clamp(
319          startRotRef.current.x - dyTotal / dragSensitivity,
320          -maxVerticalRotationDeg,
321          maxVerticalRotationDeg
322        );
323        const nextY = wrapAngleSigned(startRotRef.current.y + dxTotal / dragSensitivity);
324        if (rotationRef.current.x !== nextX || rotationRef.current.y !== nextY) {
325          rotationRef.current = { x: nextX, y: nextY };
326          applyTransform(nextX, nextY);
327        }
328        if (last) {
329          draggingRef.current = false;
330          let [vMagX, vMagY] = velocity;
331          const [dirX, dirY] = direction;
332          let vx = vMagX * dirX;
333          let vy = vMagY * dirY;
334          if (Math.abs(vx) < 0.001 && Math.abs(vy) < 0.001 && Array.isArray(movement)) {
335            const [mx, my] = movement;
336            vx = clamp((mx / dragSensitivity) * 0.02, -1.2, 1.2);
337            vy = clamp((my / dragSensitivity) * 0.02, -1.2, 1.2);
338          }
339          if (Math.abs(vx) > 0.005 || Math.abs(vy) > 0.005) startInertia(vx, vy);
340          if (movedRef.current) lastDragEndAt.current = performance.now();
341          movedRef.current = false;
342        }
343      }
344    },
345    { target: mainRef, eventOptions: { passive: true } }
346  );
347
348  useEffect(() => {
349    const scrim = scrimRef.current;
350    if (!scrim) return;
351    const close = () => {
352      if (performance.now() - openStartedAtRef.current < 250) return;
353      const el = focusedElRef.current;
354      if (!el) return;
355      const parent = el.parentElement;
356      const overlay = viewerRef.current?.querySelector('.enlarge');
357      if (!overlay) return;
358      const refDiv = parent.querySelector('.item__image--reference');
359      const originalPos = originalTilePositionRef.current;
360      if (!originalPos) {
361        overlay.remove();
362        if (refDiv) refDiv.remove();
363        parent.style.setProperty('--rot-y-delta', '0deg');
364        parent.style.setProperty('--rot-x-delta', '0deg');
365        el.style.visibility = '';
366        el.style.zIndex = 0;
367        focusedElRef.current = null;
368        rootRef.current?.removeAttribute('data-enlarging');
369        openingRef.current = false;
370        unlockScroll();
371        return;
372      }
373      const currentRect = overlay.getBoundingClientRect();
374      const rootRect = rootRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
375      const originalPosRelativeToRoot = {
376        left: originalPos.left - rootRect.left,
377        top: originalPos.top - rootRect.top,
378        width: originalPos.width,
379        height: originalPos.height
380      };
381      const overlayRelativeToRoot = {
382        left: currentRect.left - rootRect.left,
383        top: currentRect.top - rootRect.top,
384        width: currentRect.width,
385        height: currentRect.height
386      };
387      const animatingOverlay = document.createElement('div');
388      animatingOverlay.className = 'enlarge-closing';
389      animatingOverlay.style.cssText = `position:absolute;left:${overlayRelativeToRoot.left}px;top:${overlayRelativeToRoot.top}px;width:${overlayRelativeToRoot.width}px;height:${overlayRelativeToRoot.height}px;z-index:9999;border-radius: var(--enlarge-radius, 32px);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35);transition:all ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease-out;pointer-events:none;margin:0;transform:none;`;
390      const originalImg = overlay.querySelector('img');
391      if (originalImg) {
392        const img = originalImg.cloneNode();
393        img.style.cssText = 'width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;';
394        animatingOverlay.appendChild(img);
395      }
396      overlay.remove();
397      rootRef.current.appendChild(animatingOverlay);
398      void animatingOverlay.getBoundingClientRect();
399      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
400        animatingOverlay.style.left = originalPosRelativeToRoot.left + 'px';
401        animatingOverlay.style.top = originalPosRelativeToRoot.top + 'px';
402        animatingOverlay.style.width = originalPosRelativeToRoot.width + 'px';
403        animatingOverlay.style.height = originalPosRelativeToRoot.height + 'px';
404        animatingOverlay.style.opacity = '0';
405      });
406      const cleanup = () => {
407        animatingOverlay.remove();
408        originalTilePositionRef.current = null;
409        if (refDiv) refDiv.remove();
410        parent.style.transition = 'none';
411        el.style.transition = 'none';
412        parent.style.setProperty('--rot-y-delta', '0deg');
413        parent.style.setProperty('--rot-x-delta', '0deg');
414        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
415          el.style.visibility = '';
416          el.style.opacity = '0';
417          el.style.zIndex = 0;
418          focusedElRef.current = null;
419          rootRef.current?.removeAttribute('data-enlarging');
420          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
421            parent.style.transition = '';
422            el.style.transition = 'opacity 300ms ease-out';
423            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
424              el.style.opacity = '1';
425              setTimeout(() => {
426                el.style.transition = '';
427                el.style.opacity = '';
428                openingRef.current = false;
429                if (!draggingRef.current && rootRef.current?.getAttribute('data-enlarging') !== 'true')
430                  document.body.classList.remove('dg-scroll-lock');
431              }, 300);
432            });
433          });
434        });
435      };
436      animatingOverlay.addEventListener('transitionend', cleanup, { once: true });
437    };
438    scrim.addEventListener('click', close);
439    const onKey = e => {
440      if (e.key === 'Escape') close();
441    };
442    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
443    return () => {
444      scrim.removeEventListener('click', close);
445      window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey);
446    };
447  }, [enlargeTransitionMs, unlockScroll]);
448
449  const openItemFromElement = useCallback(
450    el => {
451      if (openingRef.current) return;
452      openingRef.current = true;
453      openStartedAtRef.current = performance.now();
454      lockScroll();
455      const parent = el.parentElement;
456      focusedElRef.current = el;
457      el.setAttribute('data-focused', 'true');
458      const offsetX = getDataNumber(parent, 'offsetX', 0);
459      const offsetY = getDataNumber(parent, 'offsetY', 0);
460      const sizeX = getDataNumber(parent, 'sizeX', 2);
461      const sizeY = getDataNumber(parent, 'sizeY', 2);
462      const parentRot = computeItemBaseRotation(offsetX, offsetY, sizeX, sizeY, segments);
463      const parentY = normalizeAngle(parentRot.rotateY);
464      const globalY = normalizeAngle(rotationRef.current.y);
465      let rotY = -(parentY + globalY) % 360;
466      if (rotY < -180) rotY += 360;
467      const rotX = -parentRot.rotateX - rotationRef.current.x;
468      parent.style.setProperty('--rot-y-delta', `${rotY}deg`);
469      parent.style.setProperty('--rot-x-delta', `${rotX}deg`);
470      const refDiv = document.createElement('div');
471      refDiv.className = 'item__image item__image--reference';
472      refDiv.style.opacity = '0';
473      refDiv.style.transform = `rotateX(${-parentRot.rotateX}deg) rotateY(${-parentRot.rotateY}deg)`;
474      parent.appendChild(refDiv);
475
476      void refDiv.offsetHeight;
477
478      const tileR = refDiv.getBoundingClientRect();
479      const mainR = mainRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();
480      const frameR = frameRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();
481
482      if (!mainR || !frameR || tileR.width <= 0 || tileR.height <= 0) {
483        openingRef.current = false;
484        focusedElRef.current = null;
485        parent.removeChild(refDiv);
486        unlockScroll();
487        return;
488      }
489
490      originalTilePositionRef.current = { left: tileR.left, top: tileR.top, width: tileR.width, height: tileR.height };
491      el.style.visibility = 'hidden';
492      el.style.zIndex = 0;
493      const overlay = document.createElement('div');
494      overlay.className = 'enlarge';
495      overlay.style.position = 'absolute';
496      overlay.style.left = frameR.left - mainR.left + 'px';
497      overlay.style.top = frameR.top - mainR.top + 'px';
498      overlay.style.width = frameR.width + 'px';
499      overlay.style.height = frameR.height + 'px';
500      overlay.style.opacity = '0';
501      overlay.style.zIndex = '30';
502      overlay.style.willChange = 'transform, opacity';
503      overlay.style.transformOrigin = 'top left';
504      overlay.style.transition = `transform ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease, opacity ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease`;
505      const rawSrc = parent.dataset.src || el.querySelector('img')?.src || '';
506      const img = document.createElement('img');
507      img.src = rawSrc;
508      overlay.appendChild(img);
509      viewerRef.current.appendChild(overlay);
510      const tx0 = tileR.left - frameR.left;
511      const ty0 = tileR.top - frameR.top;
512      const sx0 = tileR.width / frameR.width;
513      const sy0 = tileR.height / frameR.height;
514
515      const validSx0 = isFinite(sx0) && sx0 > 0 ? sx0 : 1;
516      const validSy0 = isFinite(sy0) && sy0 > 0 ? sy0 : 1;
517
518      overlay.style.transform = `translate(${tx0}px, ${ty0}px) scale(${validSx0}, ${validSy0})`;
519
520      setTimeout(() => {
521        if (!overlay.parentElement) return;
522        overlay.style.opacity = '1';
523        overlay.style.transform = 'translate(0px, 0px) scale(1, 1)';
524        rootRef.current?.setAttribute('data-enlarging', 'true');
525      }, 16);
526
527      const wantsResize = openedImageWidth || openedImageHeight;
528      if (wantsResize) {
529        const onFirstEnd = ev => {
530          if (ev.propertyName !== 'transform') return;
531          overlay.removeEventListener('transitionend', onFirstEnd);
532          const prevTransition = overlay.style.transition;
533          overlay.style.transition = 'none';
534          const tempWidth = openedImageWidth || `${frameR.width}px`;
535          const tempHeight = openedImageHeight || `${frameR.height}px`;
536          overlay.style.width = tempWidth;
537          overlay.style.height = tempHeight;
538          const newRect = overlay.getBoundingClientRect();
539          overlay.style.width = frameR.width + 'px';
540          overlay.style.height = frameR.height + 'px';
541          void overlay.offsetWidth;
542          overlay.style.transition = `left ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease, top ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease, width ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease, height ${enlargeTransitionMs}ms ease`;
543          const centeredLeft = frameR.left - mainR.left + (frameR.width - newRect.width) / 2;
544          const centeredTop = frameR.top - mainR.top + (frameR.height - newRect.height) / 2;
545          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
546            overlay.style.left = `${centeredLeft}px`;
547            overlay.style.top = `${centeredTop}px`;
548            overlay.style.width = tempWidth;
549            overlay.style.height = tempHeight;
550          });
551          const cleanupSecond = () => {
552            overlay.removeEventListener('transitionend', cleanupSecond);
553            overlay.style.transition = prevTransition;
554          };
555          overlay.addEventListener('transitionend', cleanupSecond, { once: true });
556        };
557        overlay.addEventListener('transitionend', onFirstEnd);
558      }
559    },
560    [enlargeTransitionMs, lockScroll, openedImageHeight, openedImageWidth, segments, unlockScroll]
561  );
562
563  const onTileClick = useCallback(
564    e => {
565      if (draggingRef.current) return;
566      if (movedRef.current) return;
567      if (performance.now() - lastDragEndAt.current < 80) return;
568      if (openingRef.current) return;
569      openItemFromElement(e.currentTarget);
570    },
571    [openItemFromElement]
572  );
573
574  const onTilePointerUp = useCallback(
575    e => {
576      if (e.pointerType !== 'touch') return;
577      if (draggingRef.current) return;
578      if (movedRef.current) return;
579      if (performance.now() - lastDragEndAt.current < 80) return;
580      if (openingRef.current) return;
581      openItemFromElement(e.currentTarget);
582    },
583    [openItemFromElement]
584  );
585
586  useEffect(() => {
587    return () => {
588      document.body.classList.remove('dg-scroll-lock');
589    };
590  }, []);
591
592  return (
593    <div
594      ref={rootRef}
595      className="sphere-root"
596      style={{
597        ['--segments-x']: segments,
598        ['--segments-y']: segments,
599        ['--overlay-blur-color']: overlayBlurColor,
600        ['--tile-radius']: imageBorderRadius,
601        ['--enlarge-radius']: openedImageBorderRadius,
602        ['--image-filter']: grayscale ? 'grayscale(1)' : 'none'
603      }}
604    >
605      <main ref={mainRef} className="sphere-main">
606        <div className="stage">
607          <div ref={sphereRef} className="sphere">
608            {items.map((it, i) => (
609              <div
610                key={`${it.x},${it.y},${i}`}
611                className="item"
612                data-src={it.src}
613                data-offset-x={it.x}
614                data-offset-y={it.y}
615                data-size-x={it.sizeX}
616                data-size-y={it.sizeY}
617                style={{
618                  ['--offset-x']: it.x,
619                  ['--offset-y']: it.y,
620                  ['--item-size-x']: it.sizeX,
621                  ['--item-size-y']: it.sizeY
622                }}
623              >
624                <div
625                  className="item__image"
626                  role="button"
627                  tabIndex={0}
628                  aria-label={it.alt || 'Open image'}
629                  onClick={onTileClick}
630                  onPointerUp={onTilePointerUp}
631                >
632                  <img src={it.src} draggable={false} alt={it.alt} />
633                </div>
634              </div>
635            ))}
636          </div>
637        </div>
638
639        <div className="overlay" />
640        <div className="overlay overlay--blur" />
641        <div className="edge-fade edge-fade--top" />
642        <div className="edge-fade edge-fade--bottom" />
643
644        <div className="viewer" ref={viewerRef}>
645          <div ref={scrimRef} className="scrim" />
646          <div ref={frameRef} className="frame" />
647        </div>
648      </main>
649    </div>
650  );
651}
652

Component: Chroma Grid

--------------------------------------------------

Component: Folder

Installation:
npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Folder-JS-CSS

Usage:
1import Folder from './Folder'
2
3<div style={{ height: '600px', position: 'relative' }}>
4  <Folder size={2} color="#5227FF" className="custom-folder"
5  color="#5227FF"
6  size={2}
7/>
8</div>

Code:
1import { useState } from 'react';
2import './Folder.css';
3
4const darkenColor = (hex, percent) => {
5  let color = hex.startsWith('#') ? hex.slice(1) : hex;
6  if (color.length === 3) {
7    color = color
8      .split('')
9      .map(c => c + c)
10      .join('');
11  }
12  const num = parseInt(color, 16);
13  let r = (num >> 16) & 0xff;
14  let g = (num >> 8) & 0xff;
15  let b = num & 0xff;
16  r = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor(r * (1 - percent))));
17  g = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor(g * (1 - percent))));
18  b = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor(b * (1 - percent))));
19  return '#' + ((1 << 24) + (r << 16) + (g << 8) + b).toString(16).slice(1).toUpperCase();
20};
21
22const Folder = ({ color = '#5227FF', size = 1, items = [], className = '' }) => {
23  const maxItems = 3;
24  const papers = items.slice(0, maxItems);
25  while (papers.length < maxItems) {
26    papers.push(null);
27  }
28
29  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
30  const [paperOffsets, setPaperOffsets] = useState(Array.from({ length: maxItems }, () => ({ x: 0, y: 0 })));
31
32  const folderBackColor = darkenColor(color, 0.08);
33  const paper1 = darkenColor('#ffffff', 0.1);
34  const paper2 = darkenColor('#ffffff', 0.05);
35  const paper3 = '#ffffff';
36
37  const handleClick = () => {
38    setOpen(prev => !prev);
39    if (open) {
40      setPaperOffsets(Array.from({ length: maxItems }, () => ({ x: 0, y: 0 })));
41    }
42  };
43
44  const handlePaperMouseMove = (e, index) => {
45    if (!open) return;
46    const rect = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
47    const centerX = rect.left + rect.width / 2;
48    const centerY = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
49    const offsetX = (e.clientX - centerX) * 0.15;
50    const offsetY = (e.clientY - centerY) * 0.15;
51    setPaperOffsets(prev => {
52      const newOffsets = [...prev];
53      newOffsets[index] = { x: offsetX, y: offsetY };
54      return newOffsets;
55    });
56  };
57
58  const handlePaperMouseLeave = (e, index) => {
59    setPaperOffsets(prev => {
60      const newOffsets = [...prev];
61      newOffsets[index] = { x: 0, y: 0 };
62      return newOffsets;
63    });
64  };
65
66  const folderStyle = {
67    '--folder-color': color,
68    '--folder-back-color': folderBackColor,
69    '--paper-1': paper1,
70    '--paper-2': paper2,
71    '--paper-3': paper3
72  };
73
74  const folderClassName = `folder ${open ? 'open' : ''}`.trim();
75  const scaleStyle = { transform: `scale(${size})` };
76
77  return (
78    <div style={scaleStyle} className={className}>
79      <div className={folderClassName} style={folderStyle} onClick={handleClick}>
80        <div className="folder__back">
81          {papers.map((item, i) => (
82            <div
83              key={i}
84              className={`paper paper-${i + 1}`}
85              onMouseMove={e => handlePaperMouseMove(e, i)}
86              onMouseLeave={e => handlePaperMouseLeave(e, i)}
87              style={
88                open
89                  ? {
90                      '--magnet-x': `${paperOffsets[i]?.x || 0}px`,
91                      '--magnet-y': `${paperOffsets[i]?.y || 0}px`
92                    }
93                  : {}
94              }
95            >
96              {item}
97            </div>
98          ))}
99          <div className="folder__front"></div>
100          <div className="folder__front right"></div>
101        </div>
102      </div>
103    </div>
104  );
105};
106
107export default Folder;
108

Extra Config/Code:

4  --paper-1: #e6e6e6;

6  --paper-3: #ffffff;
7}

24}

44  height: 80%;
45}

48  transform: translate(10%, -70%) rotateZ(15deg) scale(1.1);
49}
50
51.folder.open .paper:nth-child(3) {
52  transform: translate(-50%, -100%) rotateZ(5deg);
53  height: 80%;
54}
55

57  transform: translate(-50%, -100%) rotateZ(5deg) scale(1.1);
58}
59
60.folder.open .folder__front {
61  transform: skew(15deg) scaleY(0.6);
62}

66}

73  border-radius: 0px 10px 10px 10px;
74}
75
76.folder__back::after {

78  z-index: 0;
79  bottom: 98%;
80  left: 0;
81  content: '';
82  width: 30px;
83  height: 10px;
84  background: var(--folder-back-color);
85  border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0;
86}
87
88.paper {
89  position: absolute;
90  z-index: 2;
91  bottom: 10%;
92  left: 50%;
93  transform: translate(-50%, 10%);
94  width: 70%;
95  height: 80%;
96  background: var(--paper-1);
97  border-radius: 10px;
98  transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;
99}
100
101.paper:nth-child(2) {
102  background: var(--paper-2);
103  width: 80%;
104  height: 70%;
105}
106
107.paper:nth-child(3) {
108  background: var(--paper-3);
109  width: 90%;
110  height: 60%;
111}
112
113.folder__front {
114  position: absolute;
115  z-index: 3;
116  width: 100%;
117  height: 100%;
118  background: var(--folder-color);
119  border-radius: 5px 10px 10px 10px;
120  transform-origin: bottom;
121  transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;
122}

--------------------------------------------------

Component: Staggered Menu

Installation:
npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/StaggeredMenu-JS-CSS

Usage:
1import StaggeredMenu from './StaggeredMenu';
2
3const menuItems = [
4  { label: 'Home', ariaLabel: 'Go to home page', link: '/' },
5  { label: 'About', ariaLabel: 'Learn about us', link: '/about' },
6  { label: 'Services', ariaLabel: 'View our services', link: '/services' },
7  { label: 'Contact', ariaLabel: 'Get in touch', link: '/contact' }
8];
9
10const socialItems = [
11  { label: 'Twitter', link: 'https://twitter.com' },
12  { label: 'GitHub', link: 'https://github.com' },
13  { label: 'LinkedIn', link: 'https://linkedin.com' }
14];
15
16<div style={{ height: '100vh', background: '#1a1a1a' }}>
17  <StaggeredMenu
18    position="right"
19    items={menuItems}
20    socialItems={socialItems}
21    displaySocials
22    displayItemNumbering={true}
23    menuButtonColor="#ffffff"
24    openMenuButtonColor="#fff"
25    changeMenuColorOnOpen={true}
26    colors={['#B19EEF', '#5227FF']}
27    logoUrl="/path-to-your-logo.svg"
28    accentColor="#5227FF"
29    onMenuOpen={() => console.log('Menu opened')}
30    onMenuClose={() => console.log('Menu closed')}
31  />
32</div>

Code:
1import React, { useCallback, useLayoutEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
2import { gsap } from 'gsap';
3import './StaggeredMenu.css';
4
5export const StaggeredMenu = ({
6  position = 'right',
7  colors = ['#B19EEF', '#5227FF'],
8  items = [],
9  socialItems = [],
10  displaySocials = true,
11  displayItemNumbering = true,
12  className,
13  logoUrl = '/src/assets/logos/reactbits-gh-white.svg',
14  menuButtonColor = '#fff',
15  openMenuButtonColor = '#fff',
16  accentColor = '#5227FF',
17  changeMenuColorOnOpen = true,
18  isFixed = false,
19  closeOnClickAway = true,
20  onMenuOpen,
21  onMenuClose
22}) => {
23  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
24  const openRef = useRef(false);
25  const panelRef = useRef(null);
26  const preLayersRef = useRef(null);
27  const preLayerElsRef = useRef([]);
28  const plusHRef = useRef(null);
29  const plusVRef = useRef(null);
30  const iconRef = useRef(null);
31  const textInnerRef = useRef(null);
32  const textWrapRef = useRef(null);
33  const [textLines, setTextLines] = useState(['Menu', 'Close']);
34
35  const openTlRef = useRef(null);
36  const closeTweenRef = useRef(null);
37  const spinTweenRef = useRef(null);
38  const textCycleAnimRef = useRef(null);
39  const colorTweenRef = useRef(null);
40  const toggleBtnRef = useRef(null);
41  const busyRef = useRef(false);
42  const itemEntranceTweenRef = useRef(null);
43
44  useLayoutEffect(() => {
45    const ctx = gsap.context(() => {
46      const panel = panelRef.current;
47      const preContainer = preLayersRef.current;
48      const plusH = plusHRef.current;
49      const plusV = plusVRef.current;
50      const icon = iconRef.current;
51      const textInner = textInnerRef.current;
52      if (!panel || !plusH || !plusV || !icon || !textInner) return;
53
54      let preLayers = [];
55      if (preContainer) {
56        preLayers = Array.from(preContainer.querySelectorAll('.sm-prelayer'));
57      }
58      preLayerElsRef.current = preLayers;
59
60      const offscreen = position === 'left' ? -100 : 100;
61      gsap.set([panel, ...preLayers], { xPercent: offscreen });
62      gsap.set(plusH, { transformOrigin: '50% 50%', rotate: 0 });
63      gsap.set(plusV, { transformOrigin: '50% 50%', rotate: 90 });
64      gsap.set(icon, { rotate: 0, transformOrigin: '50% 50%' });
65      gsap.set(textInner, { yPercent: 0 });
66      if (toggleBtnRef.current) gsap.set(toggleBtnRef.current, { color: menuButtonColor });
67    });
68    return () => ctx.revert();
69  }, [menuButtonColor, position]);
70
71  const buildOpenTimeline = useCallback(() => {
72    const panel = panelRef.current;
73    const layers = preLayerElsRef.current;
74    if (!panel) return null;
75
76    openTlRef.current?.kill();
77    if (closeTweenRef.current) {
78      closeTweenRef.current.kill();
79      closeTweenRef.current = null;
80    }
81    itemEntranceTweenRef.current?.kill();
82
83    const itemEls = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.sm-panel-itemLabel'));
84    const numberEls = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.sm-panel-list[data-numbering] .sm-panel-item'));
85    const socialTitle = panel.querySelector('.sm-socials-title');
86    const socialLinks = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.sm-socials-link'));
87
88    const layerStates = layers.map(el => ({ el, start: Number(gsap.getProperty(el, 'xPercent')) }));
89    const panelStart = Number(gsap.getProperty(panel, 'xPercent'));
90
91    if (itemEls.length) {
92      gsap.set(itemEls, { yPercent: 140, rotate: 10 });
93    }
94    if (numberEls.length) {
95      gsap.set(numberEls, { '--sm-num-opacity': 0 });
96    }
97    if (socialTitle) {
98      gsap.set(socialTitle, { opacity: 0 });
99    }
100    if (socialLinks.length) {
101      gsap.set(socialLinks, { y: 25, opacity: 0 });
102    }
103
104    const tl = gsap.timeline({ paused: true });
105
106    layerStates.forEach((ls, i) => {
107      tl.fromTo(ls.el, { xPercent: ls.start }, { xPercent: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power4.out' }, i * 0.07);
108    });
109    const lastTime = layerStates.length ? (layerStates.length - 1) * 0.07 : 0;
110    const panelInsertTime = lastTime + (layerStates.length ? 0.08 : 0);
111    const panelDuration = 0.65;
112    tl.fromTo(
113      panel,
114      { xPercent: panelStart },
115      { xPercent: 0, duration: panelDuration, ease: 'power4.out' },
116      panelInsertTime
117    );
118
119    if (itemEls.length) {
120      const itemsStartRatio = 0.15;
121      const itemsStart = panelInsertTime + panelDuration * itemsStartRatio;
122      tl.to(
123        itemEls,
124        {
125          yPercent: 0,
126          rotate: 0,
127          duration: 1,
128          ease: 'power4.out',
129          stagger: { each: 0.1, from: 'start' }
130        },
131        itemsStart
132      );
133      if (numberEls.length) {
134        tl.to(
135          numberEls,
136          {
137            duration: 0.6,
138            ease: 'power2.out',
139            '--sm-num-opacity': 1,
140            stagger: { each: 0.08, from: 'start' }
141          },
142          itemsStart + 0.1
143        );
144      }
145    }
146
147    if (socialTitle || socialLinks.length) {
148      const socialsStart = panelInsertTime + panelDuration * 0.4;
149      if (socialTitle) {
150        tl.to(
151          socialTitle,
152          {
153            opacity: 1,
154            duration: 0.5,
155            ease: 'power2.out'
156          },
157          socialsStart
158        );
159      }
160      if (socialLinks.length) {
161        tl.to(
162          socialLinks,
163          {
164            y: 0,
165            opacity: 1,
166            duration: 0.55,
167            ease: 'power3.out',
168            stagger: { each: 0.08, from: 'start' },
169            onComplete: () => {
170              gsap.set(socialLinks, { clearProps: 'opacity' });
171            }
172          },
173          socialsStart + 0.04
174        );
175      }
176    }
177
178    openTlRef.current = tl;
179    return tl;
180  }, []);
181
182  const playOpen = useCallback(() => {
183    if (busyRef.current) return;
184    busyRef.current = true;
185    const tl = buildOpenTimeline();
186    if (tl) {
187      tl.eventCallback('onComplete', () => {
188        busyRef.current = false;
189      });
190      tl.play(0);
191    } else {
192      busyRef.current = false;
193    }
194  }, [buildOpenTimeline]);
195
196  const playClose = useCallback(() => {
197    openTlRef.current?.kill();
198    openTlRef.current = null;
199    itemEntranceTweenRef.current?.kill();
200
201    const panel = panelRef.current;
202    const layers = preLayerElsRef.current;
203    if (!panel) return;
204
205    const all = [...layers, panel];
206    closeTweenRef.current?.kill();
207    const offscreen = position === 'left' ? -100 : 100;
208    closeTweenRef.current = gsap.to(all, {
209      xPercent: offscreen,
210      duration: 0.32,
211      ease: 'power3.in',
212      overwrite: 'auto',
213      onComplete: () => {
214        const itemEls = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.sm-panel-itemLabel'));
215        if (itemEls.length) {
216          gsap.set(itemEls, { yPercent: 140, rotate: 10 });
217        }
218        const numberEls = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.sm-panel-list[data-numbering] .sm-panel-item'));
219        if (numberEls.length) {
220          gsap.set(numberEls, { '--sm-num-opacity': 0 });
221        }
222        const socialTitle = panel.querySelector('.sm-socials-title');
223        const socialLinks = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.sm-socials-link'));
224        if (socialTitle) gsap.set(socialTitle, { opacity: 0 });
225        if (socialLinks.length) gsap.set(socialLinks, { y: 25, opacity: 0 });
226        busyRef.current = false;
227      }
228    });
229  }, [position]);
230
231  const animateIcon = useCallback(opening => {
232    const icon = iconRef.current;
233    if (!icon) return;
234    spinTweenRef.current?.kill();
235    if (opening) {
236      spinTweenRef.current = gsap.to(icon, { rotate: 225, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power4.out', overwrite: 'auto' });
237    } else {
238      spinTweenRef.current = gsap.to(icon, { rotate: 0, duration: 0.35, ease: 'power3.inOut', overwrite: 'auto' });
239    }
240  }, []);
241
242  const animateColor = useCallback(
243    opening => {
244      const btn = toggleBtnRef.current;
245      if (!btn) return;
246      colorTweenRef.current?.kill();
247      if (changeMenuColorOnOpen) {
248        const targetColor = opening ? openMenuButtonColor : menuButtonColor;
249        colorTweenRef.current = gsap.to(btn, {
250          color: targetColor,
251          delay: 0.18,
252          duration: 0.3,
253          ease: 'power2.out'
254        });
255      } else {
256        gsap.set(btn, { color: menuButtonColor });
257      }
258    },
259    [openMenuButtonColor, menuButtonColor, changeMenuColorOnOpen]
260  );
261
262  React.useEffect(() => {
263    if (toggleBtnRef.current) {
264      if (changeMenuColorOnOpen) {
265        const targetColor = openRef.current ? openMenuButtonColor : menuButtonColor;
266        gsap.set(toggleBtnRef.current, { color: targetColor });
267      } else {
268        gsap.set(toggleBtnRef.current, { color: menuButtonColor });
269      }
270    }
271  }, [changeMenuColorOnOpen, menuButtonColor, openMenuButtonColor]);
272
273  const animateText = useCallback(opening => {
274    const inner = textInnerRef.current;
275    if (!inner) return;
276    textCycleAnimRef.current?.kill();
277
278    const currentLabel = opening ? 'Menu' : 'Close';
279    const targetLabel = opening ? 'Close' : 'Menu';
280    const cycles = 3;
281    const seq = [currentLabel];
282    let last = currentLabel;
283    for (let i = 0; i < cycles; i++) {
284      last = last === 'Menu' ? 'Close' : 'Menu';
285      seq.push(last);
286    }
287    if (last !== targetLabel) seq.push(targetLabel);
288    seq.push(targetLabel);
289    setTextLines(seq);
290
291    gsap.set(inner, { yPercent: 0 });
292    const lineCount = seq.length;
293    const finalShift = ((lineCount - 1) / lineCount) * 100;
294    textCycleAnimRef.current = gsap.to(inner, {
295      yPercent: -finalShift,
296      duration: 0.5 + lineCount * 0.07,
297      ease: 'power4.out'
298    });
299  }, []);
300
301  const toggleMenu = useCallback(() => {
302    const target = !openRef.current;
303    openRef.current = target;
304    setOpen(target);
305    if (target) {
306      onMenuOpen?.();
307      playOpen();
308    } else {
309      onMenuClose?.();
310      playClose();
311    }
312    animateIcon(target);
313    animateColor(target);
314    animateText(target);
315  }, [playOpen, playClose, animateIcon, animateColor, animateText, onMenuOpen, onMenuClose]);
316
317  const closeMenu = useCallback(() => {
318    if (openRef.current) {
319      openRef.current = false;
320      setOpen(false);
321      onMenuClose?.();
322      playClose();
323      animateIcon(false);
324      animateColor(false);
325      animateText(false);
326    }
327  }, [playClose, animateIcon, animateColor, animateText, onMenuClose]);
328
329  React.useEffect(() => {
330    if (!closeOnClickAway || !open) return;
331
332    const handleClickOutside = event => {
333      if (
334        panelRef.current &&
335        !panelRef.current.contains(event.target) &&
336        toggleBtnRef.current &&
337        !toggleBtnRef.current.contains(event.target)
338      ) {
339        closeMenu();
340      }
341    };
342
343    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
344    return () => {
345      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
346    };
347  }, [closeOnClickAway, open, closeMenu]);
348
349  return (
350    <div
351      className={(className ? className + ' ' : '') + 'staggered-menu-wrapper' + (isFixed ? ' fixed-wrapper' : '')}
352      style={accentColor ? { ['--sm-accent']: accentColor } : undefined}
353      data-position={position}
354      data-open={open || undefined}
355    >
356      <div ref={preLayersRef} className="sm-prelayers" aria-hidden="true">
357        {(() => {
358          const raw = colors && colors.length ? colors.slice(0, 4) : ['#1e1e22', '#35353c'];
359          let arr = [...raw];
360          if (arr.length >= 3) {
361            const mid = Math.floor(arr.length / 2);
362            arr.splice(mid, 1);
363          }
364          return arr.map((c, i) => <div key={i} className="sm-prelayer" style={{ background: c }} />);
365        })()}
366      </div>
367      <header className="staggered-menu-header" aria-label="Main navigation header">
368        <div className="sm-logo" aria-label="Logo">
369          <img
370            src={logoUrl || '/src/assets/logos/reactbits-gh-white.svg'}
371            alt="Logo"
372            className="sm-logo-img"
373            draggable={false}
374            width={110}
375            height={24}
376          />
377        </div>
378        <button
379          ref={toggleBtnRef}
380          className="sm-toggle"
381          aria-label={open ? 'Close menu' : 'Open menu'}
382          aria-expanded={open}
383          aria-controls="staggered-menu-panel"
384          onClick={toggleMenu}
385          type="button"
386        >
387          <span ref={textWrapRef} className="sm-toggle-textWrap" aria-hidden="true">
388            <span ref={textInnerRef} className="sm-toggle-textInner">
389              {textLines.map((l, i) => (
390                <span className="sm-toggle-line" key={i}>
391                  {l}
392                </span>
393              ))}
394            </span>
395          </span>
396          <span ref={iconRef} className="sm-icon" aria-hidden="true">
397            <span ref={plusHRef} className="sm-icon-line" />
398            <span ref={plusVRef} className="sm-icon-line sm-icon-line-v" />
399          </span>
400        </button>
401      </header>
402
403      <aside id="staggered-menu-panel" ref={panelRef} className="staggered-menu-panel" aria-hidden={!open}>
404        <div className="sm-panel-inner">
405          <ul className="sm-panel-list" role="list" data-numbering={displayItemNumbering || undefined}>
406            {items && items.length ? (
407              items.map((it, idx) => (
408                <li className="sm-panel-itemWrap" key={it.label + idx}>
409                  <a className="sm-panel-item" href={it.link} aria-label={it.ariaLabel} data-index={idx + 1}>
410                    <span className="sm-panel-itemLabel">{it.label}</span>
411                  </a>
412                </li>
413              ))
414            ) : (
415              <li className="sm-panel-itemWrap" aria-hidden="true">
416                <span className="sm-panel-item">
417                  <span className="sm-panel-itemLabel">No items</span>
418                </span>
419              </li>
420            )}
421          </ul>
422          {displaySocials && socialItems && socialItems.length > 0 && (
423            <div className="sm-socials" aria-label="Social links">
424              <h3 className="sm-socials-title">Socials</h3>
425              <ul className="sm-socials-list" role="list">
426                {socialItems.map((s, i) => (
427                  <li key={s.label + i} className="sm-socials-item">
428                    <a href={s.link} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="sm-socials-link">
429                      {s.label}
430                    </a>
431                  </li>
432                ))}
433              </ul>
434            </div>
435          )}
436        </div>
437      </aside>
438    </div>
439  );
440};
441
442export default StaggeredMenu;
443

--------------------------------------------------

Component: Model Viewer

--------------------------------------------------

Component: Lanyard

Installation:
npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Lanyard-JS-CSS

Usage:
1import Lanyard from './Lanyard'
2
3<Lanyard position={[0, 0, 20]} gravity={[0, -40, 0]} />
4
5/* IMPORTANT INFO BELOW
6
71. You MUST have the card.glb and lanyard.png files in your project and import them
8- these can be downloaded from the repo's files, under src/assets/lanyard
9
102. You can edit your card.glb file in this online .glb editor and change the texture:
11- https://modelviewer.dev/editor/
12
134. The png file is the texture for the lanyard's band and can be edited in any image editor
14
155. Your Vite configuration must be updated to include the following in vite.config.js:
16assetsInclude: ['**/*.glb']
17
186. For TS users, you might need these changes:
19
20- src/global.d.ts
21export { };
22
23declare module '*.glb';
24declare module '*.png';
25
26declare module 'meshline' {
27  export const MeshLineGeometry: any;
28  export const MeshLineMaterial: any;
29}
30
31declare global {
32  namespace JSX {
33    interface IntrinsicElements {
34      meshLineGeometry: any;
35      meshLineMaterial: any;
36    }
37  }
38}
39
40- src/vite-env.d.ts
41/// <reference types="vite/client"
42  position={[0,0,24]}
43  gravity={[0,-40,0]}
44/>
45declare module '*.glb';
46declare module '*.png';
47*/

Code:
1/* eslint-disable react/no-unknown-property */
2'use client';
3import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
4import { Canvas, extend, useFrame } from '@react-three/fiber';
5import { useGLTF, useTexture, Environment, Lightformer } from '@react-three/drei';
6import { BallCollider, CuboidCollider, Physics, RigidBody, useRopeJoint, useSphericalJoint } from '@react-three/rapier';
7import { MeshLineGeometry, MeshLineMaterial } from 'meshline';
8
9// replace with your own imports, see the usage snippet for details
10import cardGLB from './card.glb';
11import lanyard from './lanyard.png';
12
13import * as THREE from 'three';
14import './Lanyard.css';
15
16extend({ MeshLineGeometry, MeshLineMaterial });
17
18export default function Lanyard({ position = [0, 0, 30], gravity = [0, -40, 0], fov = 20, transparent = true }) {
19  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(() => typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.innerWidth < 768);
20
21  useEffect(() => {
22    const handleResize = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768);
23    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
24    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
25  }, []);
26
27  return (
28    <div className="lanyard-wrapper">
29      <Canvas
30        camera={{ position: position, fov: fov }}
31        dpr={[1, isMobile ? 1.5 : 2]}
32        gl={{ alpha: transparent }}
33        onCreated={({ gl }) => gl.setClearColor(new THREE.Color(0x000000), transparent ? 0 : 1)}
34      >
35        <ambientLight intensity={Math.PI} />
36        <Physics gravity={gravity} timeStep={isMobile ? 1 / 30 : 1 / 60}>
37          <Band isMobile={isMobile} />
38        </Physics>
39        <Environment blur={0.75}>
40          <Lightformer
41            intensity={2}
42            color="white"
43            position={[0, -1, 5]}
44            rotation={[0, 0, Math.PI / 3]}
45            scale={[100, 0.1, 1]}
46          />
47          <Lightformer
48            intensity={3}
49            color="white"
50            position={[-1, -1, 1]}
51            rotation={[0, 0, Math.PI / 3]}
52            scale={[100, 0.1, 1]}
53          />
54          <Lightformer
55            intensity={3}
56            color="white"
57            position={[1, 1, 1]}
58            rotation={[0, 0, Math.PI / 3]}
59            scale={[100, 0.1, 1]}
60          />
61          <Lightformer
62            intensity={10}
63            color="white"
64            position={[-10, 0, 14]}
65            rotation={[0, Math.PI / 2, Math.PI / 3]}
66            scale={[100, 10, 1]}
67          />
68        </Environment>
69      </Canvas>
70    </div>
71  );
72}
73function Band({ maxSpeed = 50, minSpeed = 0, isMobile = false }) {
74  const band = useRef(),
75    fixed = useRef(),
76    j1 = useRef(),
77    j2 = useRef(),
78    j3 = useRef(),
79    card = useRef();
80  const vec = new THREE.Vector3(),
81    ang = new THREE.Vector3(),
82    rot = new THREE.Vector3(),
83    dir = new THREE.Vector3();
84  const segmentProps = { type: 'dynamic', canSleep: true, colliders: false, angularDamping: 4, linearDamping: 4 };
85  const { nodes, materials } = useGLTF(cardGLB);
86  const texture = useTexture(lanyard);
87  const [curve] = useState(
88    () =>
89      new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3([new THREE.Vector3(), new THREE.Vector3(), new THREE.Vector3(), new THREE.Vector3()])
90  );
91  const [dragged, drag] = useState(false);
92  const [hovered, hover] = useState(false);
93
94  useRopeJoint(fixed, j1, [[0, 0, 0], [0, 0, 0], 1]);
95  useRopeJoint(j1, j2, [[0, 0, 0], [0, 0, 0], 1]);
96  useRopeJoint(j2, j3, [[0, 0, 0], [0, 0, 0], 1]);
97  useSphericalJoint(j3, card, [
98    [0, 0, 0],
99    [0, 1.5, 0]
100  ]);
101
102  useEffect(() => {
103    if (hovered) {
104      document.body.style.cursor = dragged ? 'grabbing' : 'grab';
105      return () => void (document.body.style.cursor = 'auto');
106    }
107  }, [hovered, dragged]);
108
109  useFrame((state, delta) => {
110    if (dragged) {
111      vec.set(state.pointer.x, state.pointer.y, 0.5).unproject(state.camera);
112      dir.copy(vec).sub(state.camera.position).normalize();
113      vec.add(dir.multiplyScalar(state.camera.position.length()));
114      [card, j1, j2, j3, fixed].forEach(ref => ref.current?.wakeUp());
115      card.current?.setNextKinematicTranslation({ x: vec.x - dragged.x, y: vec.y - dragged.y, z: vec.z - dragged.z });
116    }
117    if (fixed.current) {
118      [j1, j2].forEach(ref => {
119        if (!ref.current.lerped) ref.current.lerped = new THREE.Vector3().copy(ref.current.translation());
120        const clampedDistance = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(1, ref.current.lerped.distanceTo(ref.current.translation())));
121        ref.current.lerped.lerp(
122          ref.current.translation(),
123          delta * (minSpeed + clampedDistance * (maxSpeed - minSpeed))
124        );
125      });
126      curve.points[0].copy(j3.current.translation());
127      curve.points[1].copy(j2.current.lerped);
128      curve.points[2].copy(j1.current.lerped);
129      curve.points[3].copy(fixed.current.translation());
130      band.current.geometry.setPoints(curve.getPoints(isMobile ? 16 : 32));
131      ang.copy(card.current.angvel());
132      rot.copy(card.current.rotation());
133      card.current.setAngvel({ x: ang.x, y: ang.y - rot.y * 0.25, z: ang.z });
134    }
135  });
136
137  curve.curveType = 'chordal';
138  texture.wrapS = texture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
139
140  return (
141    <>
142      <group position={[0, 4, 0]}>
143        <RigidBody ref={fixed} {...segmentProps} type="fixed" />
144        <RigidBody position={[0.5, 0, 0]} ref={j1} {...segmentProps}>
145          <BallCollider args={[0.1]} />
146        </RigidBody>
147        <RigidBody position={[1, 0, 0]} ref={j2} {...segmentProps}>
148          <BallCollider args={[0.1]} />
149        </RigidBody>
150        <RigidBody position={[1.5, 0, 0]} ref={j3} {...segmentProps}>
151          <BallCollider args={[0.1]} />
152        </RigidBody>
153        <RigidBody position={[2, 0, 0]} ref={card} {...segmentProps} type={dragged ? 'kinematicPosition' : 'dynamic'}>
154          <CuboidCollider args={[0.8, 1.125, 0.01]} />
155          <group
156            scale={2.25}
157            position={[0, -1.2, -0.05]}
158            onPointerOver={() => hover(true)}
159            onPointerOut={() => hover(false)}
160            onPointerUp={e => (e.target.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId), drag(false))}
161            onPointerDown={e => (
162              e.target.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId),
163              drag(new THREE.Vector3().copy(e.point).sub(vec.copy(card.current.translation())))
164            )}
165          >
166            <mesh geometry={nodes.card.geometry}>
167              <meshPhysicalMaterial
168                map={materials.base.map}
169                map-anisotropy={16}
170                clearcoat={isMobile ? 0 : 1}
171                clearcoatRoughness={0.15}
172                roughness={0.9}
173                metalness={0.8}
174              />
175            </mesh>
176            <mesh geometry={nodes.clip.geometry} material={materials.metal} material-roughness={0.3} />
177            <mesh geometry={nodes.clamp.geometry} material={materials.metal} />
178          </group>
179        </RigidBody>
180      </group>
181      <mesh ref={band}>
182        <meshLineGeometry />
183        <meshLineMaterial
184          color="white"
185          depthTest={false}
186          resolution={isMobile ? [1000, 2000] : [1000, 1000]}
187          useMap
188          map={texture}
189          repeat={[-4, 1]}
190          lineWidth={1}
191        />
192      </mesh>
193    </>
194  );
195}
196

Extra Config/Code:
1.lanyard-wrapper {
2  position: relative;
3  z-index: 0;
4  width: 100%;
5  height: 100vh;
6  display: flex;
7  justify-content: center;
8  align-items: center;
9  transform: scale(1);
10  transform-origin: center;
11}
